name: FUJIFILM HDGS CORP. ADR 1
summary: FUJIFILM HDGS CORP. ADR 1 represents American Depositary Receipts (ADRs) of Fujifilm Holdings Corporation. Each ADR represents a specified number of shares of Fujifilm traded on a U.S. exchange. Fujifilm Holdings Corporation is a Japanese company involved in imaging, healthcare, and document solutions.
